mapper.select: SELECT album_id, MAX(IF(stat.stat_type = '0401', stat.stat_num, -1)) playStatNum, MAX(IF(stat.stat_type = '0402', stat.stat_num, -1)) subscribeStatNum, MAX(IF(stat.stat_type = '0403', stat.stat_num, -1)) buyStatNum, MAX(IF(stat.stat_type = '0403', stat.stat_num, -1)) commentStatNum FROM `album_stat` stat where stat.album_id = #{albumId}
